query: What is the business activity of company H. J. Russell & Company (Use the website https://www.hjrussell.com/ as your starting point)?Please focus on the positioning on the value chain, the product & services and the end-markets served.Please write paragraph-style starting with [company name] is .... Maintain proper hierarchy of information and keep a neutral tone, sticking to facts and avoiding marketing lingo.Answer in English.
answer:
{"answer": "H. J. Russell & Company is a vertically integrated real estate and construction services firm headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, and is one of the largest African-American-owned program and construction management firms in the United States. Founded in 1952 by Herman J. Russell as a plastering business, the company has evolved into a firm that spans the entire project lifecycle, from initial real estate development through construction execution to ongoing property management. This vertical integration allows the company to act as a single-source partner for project owners, coordinating multiple phases of delivery under one organizational umbrella.

The company's service offerings are organized into five primary construction-related disciplines. Construction Management covers coordination, field execution, and delivery of projects on budget and on schedule. Program Management provides strategic planning, governance, and accountability for complex, multi-project programs. Preconstruction offers early insight on cost, logistics, and constructability to reduce risk before construction begins. General Contracting delivers construction through hands-on supervision and trade partner coordination. Virtual Design and Construction (VDC) uses modeling, simulation, and digital coordination to visualize builds and reduce field conflicts. Beyond these construction services, the company also operates dedicated Real Estate Development and Property Management divisions, which originated in the 1960s with affordable housing projects and have since expanded into a broader portfolio. Additionally, the company provides supporting capabilities such as project controls and cost management, supplier diversity and community engagement services, and infrastructure development. Through its sister company Concessions International, the firm also operates food and beverage concessions at approximately 40 locations across eight U.S. airports.

In terms of end-markets served, the company operates across six target sectors. Government encompasses civic and public facilities. Mission Critical covers data centers, cloud and colocation facilities, and telecommunications infrastructure. Commercial includes corporate and commercial office facilities. Education and Institutional Facilities spans K-12 schools, higher education campuses, healthcare, and research and innovation facilities. Multifamily and Mixed-Use addresses residential and mixed-use developments. Transportation includes aviation and transportation infrastructure. The company delivers projects nationally, with offices in Atlanta (headquarters), Boston, Dallas, Florida, and Los Angeles, and project teams active across the United States.

Sources: [2], [3], [1], [4]

"}
